title: HUT (Hut 8) Analyst Ratings, Price Targets & Forecasts
text: HUT Analyst Coverage Summary. Analyst Consensus: Moderate Buy. Number of Analysts: 18 Wall Street analysts. Rating Breakdown: 1 Sell, 0 Hold, 16 Buy, 1 Strong Buy. Price Target Summary: Consensus Target $107.72, Current Price $102.51, Forecasted Upside 5.08%, Price Range $30.00 to $156.00. Recent Analyst Actions (Last 90 Days): Jefferies Financial Group initiated coverage with Buy rating at $156.00 (+44% upside). B. Riley Financial boosted target from $76.00 to $130.00. Rosenblatt Securities raised from $89.00 to $124.00. Canaccord Genuity increased from $70.00 to $130.00. Historical Price Target Trends: 1 Year Ago $25.93 (66.42% upside), 3 Months Ago $64.69 (20.08% upside), Current $107.72 (5.08% upside). Key Takeaway: Analysts view HUT favorably relative to competitors with Moderate Buy consensus offering modest near-term upside potential.
